00:39:30.720   return Constructor;

00:39:30.720   var isProd = typeof __TURBOPACK__imported__module__247167__["default"] !== "undefined" && __TURBOPACK__imported__module__247167__["default"].env && ("TURBOPACK compile-time value", "production") === "production";
00:39:30.720   var isString = function(o) {
00:39:30.720   return Object.prototype.toString.call(o) === "[object String]";
00:39:30.720   };
00:39:30.720   var StyleSheet = /*#__PURE__*/ function() {
00:39:30.720   function StyleSheet(param) {
00:39:30.720   var ref = param === void 0 ? {} : param, _name = ref.name, name = _name === void 0 ? "stylesheet" : _name, _optimizeForSpeed = ref.optimizeForSpeed, optimizeForSpeed = _optimizeForSpeed === void 0 ? isProd : _optimizeForSpeed;
00:39:30.720   invariant$1(isString(name), "`name` must be a string");
00:39:30.720   this._name = name;
00:39:30.720   this._deletedRulePlaceholder = "#" + name + "-deleted-rule____{}";
00:39:30.720   invariant$1(typeof optimizeForSpeed === "boolean", "`optimizeForSpeed` must be a boolean");
00:39:30.720   this._optimizeForSpeed = optimizeForSpeed;
00:39:30.720   this._serverSheet = undefined;
00:39:30.720   this._tags = [];
00:39:30.720   this._injected = false;
00:39:30.720   this._rulesCount = 0;

00:39:30.721   this._nonce = node ? node.getAttribute("content") : null;
00:39:30.721   }
00:39:30.721   var _proto = StyleSheet.prototype;
00:39:30.721   _proto.setOptimizeForSpeed = function setOptimizeForSpeed(bool) {
00:39:30.721   invariant$1(typeof bool === "boolean", "`setOptimizeForSpeed` accepts a boolean");
00:39:30.721   invariant$1(this._rulesCount === 0, "optimizeForSpeed cannot be when rules have already been inserted");
00:39:30.721   this.flush();
00:39:30.721   this._optimizeForSpeed = bool;
00:39:30.721   this.inject();
00:39:30.721   };
00:39:30.721   _proto.isOptimizeForSpeed = function isOptimizeForSpeed() {
00:39:30.721   return this._optimizeForSpeed;
00:39:30.721   };
00:39:30.721   _proto.inject = function inject() {
00:39:30.721   var _this = this;
00:39:30.721   invariant$1(!this._injected, "sheet already injected");
00:39:30.721   this._injected = true;
00:39:30.721   if (typeof window !== "undefined" && this._optimizeForSpeed) {
00:39:30.721   this._tags[0] = this.makeStyleTag(this._name);
00:39:30.721   this._optimizeForSpeed = "insertRule" in this.getSheet();
00:39:30.722   if (!this._optimizeForSpeed) {
00:39:30.722   if (!isProd) {
00:39:30.722   console.warn("StyleSheet: optimizeForSpeed mode not supported falling back to standard mode.");
00:39:30.722   }
00:39:30.722   this.flush();
00:39:30.723   this._injected = true;
00:39:30.723   }
00:39:30.723   return;
00:39:30.723   }
00:39:30.723   this._serverSheet = {
00:39:30.723   cssRules: [],
00:39:30.723   insertRule: function(rule, index) {
00:39:30.723   if (typeof index === "number") {
00:39:30.723   _this._serverSheet.cssRules[index] = {
00:39:30.723   cssText: rule
00:39:30.723   };
00:39:30.723   } else {
00:39:30.723   _this._serverSheet.cssRules.push({
00:39:30.723   cssText: rule
00:39:30.723   });
00:39:30.723   }
00:39:30.724   return index;
00:39:30.724   },
00:39:30.724   deleteRule: function(index) {
00:39:30.724   _this._serverSheet.cssRules[index] = null;
00:39:30.724   }
00:39:30.724   };
00:39:30.724   };
00:39:30.724   _proto.getSheetForTag = function getSheetForTag(tag) {
00:39:30.724   if (tag.sheet) {
00:39:30.724   return tag.sheet;
00:39:30.724   }
00:39:30.724   // this weirdness brought to you by firefox
00:39:30.724   for(var i = 0; i < document.styleSheets.length; i++){
00:39:30.724   if (document.styleSheets[i].ownerNode === tag) {
00:39:30.724   return document.styleSheets[i];
00:39:30.724   }
00:39:30.724   }
00:39:30.724   };
00:39:30.724   _proto.getSheet = function getSheet() {
00:39:30.724   return this.getSheetForTag(this._tags[this._tags.length - 1]);
00:39:30.724   };
00:39:30.724   _proto.insertRule = function insertRule(rule, index) {
00:39:30.724   invariant$1(isString(rule), "`insertRule` accepts only strings");
00:39:30.724   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
00:39:30.724   if (typeof index !== "number") {
00:39:30.724   index = this._serverSheet.cssRules.length;
00:39:30.724   }
00:39:30.724   this._serverSheet.insertRule(rule, index);
00:39:30.725   return this._rulesCount++;
00:39:30.725   }
00:39:30.725   if (this._optimizeForSpeed) {
00:39:30.725   var sheet = this.getSheet();
00:39:30.725   if (typeof index !== "number") {
00:39:30.725   index = sheet.cssRules.length;
00:39:30.725   }
00:39:30.725   // this weirdness for perf, and chrome's weird bug
00:39:30.725   // https://stackoverflow.com/questions/20007992/chrome-suddenly-stopped-accepting-insertrule
00:39:30.725   try {
00:39:30.725   sheet.insertRule(rule, index);
00:39:30.725   } catch (error) {
00:39:30.725   if (!isProd) {
00:39:30.725   console.warn("StyleSheet: illegal rule: \n\n" + rule + "\n\nSee https://stackoverflow.com/q/20007992 for more info");
00:39:30.725   }
00:39:30.725   return -1;
00:39:30.725   }
00:39:30.725   } else {
00:39:30.725   var insertionPoint = this._tags[index];
00:39:30.725   this._tags.push(this.makeStyleTag(this._name, rule, insertionPoint));
00:39:30.725   }
00:39:30.725   return this._rulesCount++;
00:39:30.725   };
00:39:30.725   _proto.replaceRule = function replaceRule(index, rule) {
00:39:30.725   if (this._optimizeForSpeed || typeof window === "undefined") {
00:39:30.725   var sheet = typeof window !== "undefined" ? this.getSheet() : this._serverSheet;
00:39:30.725   if (!rule.trim()) {
00:39:30.726   rule = this._deletedRulePlaceholder;
00:39:30.726   }
00:39:30.726   if (!sheet.cssRules[index]) {
00:39:30.726   // @TBD Should we throw an error?
00:39:30.726   return index;
00:39:30.726   }
00:39:30.726   sheet.deleteRule(index);
00:39:30.726   try {
00:39:30.726   sheet.insertRule(rule, index);
00:39:30.726   } catch (error) {
00:39:30.726   if (!isProd) {
00:39:30.726   console.warn("StyleSheet: illegal rule: \n\n" + rule + "\n\nSee https://stackoverflow.com/q/20007992 for more info");
00:39:30.726   }
00:39:30.726   // In order to preserve the indices we insert a deleteRulePlaceholder
00:39:30.726   sheet.insertRule(this._deletedRulePlaceholder, index);
00:39:30.726   }
00:39:30.726   } else {
00:39:30.726   var tag = this._tags[index];
00:39:30.726   invariant$1(tag, "old rule at index `" + index + "` not found");
00:39:30.726   tag.textContent = rule;
00:39:30.726   }
00:39:30.726   return index;
00:39:30.726   };
00:39:30.726   _proto.deleteRule = function deleteRule(index) {
00:39:30.726   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
00:39:30.726   this._serverSheet.deleteRule(index);
00:39:30.726   return;
00:39:30.727   }
00:39:30.727   if (this._optimizeForSpeed) {
00:39:30.727   this.replaceRule(index, "");
00:39:30.727   } else {
00:39:30.727   var tag = this._tags[index];
00:39:30.727   invariant$1(tag, "rule at index `" + index + "` not found");
00:39:30.727   tag.parentNode.removeChild(tag);
00:39:30.727   this._tags[index] = null;
00:39:30.727   }
00:39:30.727   };
00:39:30.727   _proto.flush = function flush() {
00:39:30.727   this._injected = false;
00:39:30.727   this._rulesCount = 0;
00:39:30.727   if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
00:39:30.727   this._tags.forEach(function(tag) {
00:39:30.727   return tag && tag.parentNode.removeChild(tag);
00:39:30.727   });
00:39:30.728   this._tags = [];
00:39:30.728   } else {
00:39:30.728   // simpler on server
00:39:30.728   this._serverSheet.cssRules = [];
00:39:30.728   }
00:39:30.728   };
00:39:30.728   _proto.cssRules = function cssRules() {
00:39:30.728   var _this = this;
00:39:30.728   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
00:39:30.729   return this._serverSheet.cssRules;
00:39:30.729   }
00:39:30.729   return this._tags.reduce(function(rules, tag) {
00:39:30.729   if (tag) {
00:39:30.729   rules = rules.concat(Array.prototype.map.call(_this.getSheetForTag(tag).cssRules, function(rule) {
00:39:30.729   return rule.cssText === _this._deletedRulePlaceholder ? null : rule;
00:39:30.729   }));
00:39:30.729   } else {
00:39:30.729   rules.push(null);
00:39:30.729   }
00:39:30.729   return rules;
00:39:30.729   }, []);
00:39:30.729   };
00:39:30.729   _proto.makeStyleTag = function makeStyleTag(name, cssString, relativeToTag) {
00:39:30.729   if (cssString) {
00:39:30.729   invariant$1(isString(cssString), "makeStyleTag accepts only strings as second parameter");
00:39:30.729   }
00:39:30.729   var tag = document.createElement("style");
00:39:30.729   if (this._nonce) tag.setAttribute("nonce", this._nonce);
00:39:30.730   tag.type = "text/css";
00:39:30.730   tag.setAttribute("data-" + name, "");
00:39:30.730   if (cssString) {
00:39:30.730   tag.appendChild(document.createTextNode(cssString));
00:39:30.730   }
00:39:30.730   var head = document.head || document.getElementsByTagName("head")[0];
00:39:30.730   if (relativeToTag) {
00:39:30.730   head.insertBefore(tag, relativeToTag);
00:39:30.730   } else {
00:39:30.730   head.appendChild(tag);
00:39:30.730   }
00:39:30.730   return tag;
00:39:30.730   };
00:39:30.730   _createClass(StyleSheet, [
00:39:30.730   {
00:39:30.730   key: "length",
00:39:30.730   get: function get() {
00:39:30.730   return this._rulesCount;
00:39:30.730   }
00:39:30.730   }
00:39:30.730   ]);
00:39:30.730   return StyleSheet;
00:39:30.730   }();
00:39:30.730   function invariant$1(condition, message) {
00:39:30.730   if (!condition) {
00:39:30.730   throw new Error("StyleSheet: " + message + ".");
00:39:30.730   }
00:39:30.730   }
00:39:30.730   function hash(str) {
00:39:30.730   var _$hash = 5381, i = str.length;
00:39:30.730   while(i){
00:39:30.730   _$hash = _$hash * 33 ^ str.charCodeAt(--i);
00:39:30.730   }
00:39:30.730   /* JavaScript does bitwise operations (like XOR, above) on 32-bit signed
00:39:30.730      * integers. Since we want the results to be always positive, convert the
00:39:30.730      * signed int to an unsigned by doing an unsigned bitshift. */ return _$hash >>> 0;
00:39:30.730   }
00:39:30.730   var stringHash = hash;
00:39:30.731   var sanitize = function(rule) {
00:39:30.731   return rule.replace(/\/style/gi, "\\/style");
00:39:30.731   };
00:39:30.731   var cache = {};
00:39:30.731   /**
00:39:30.731    * computeId
00:39:30.731    *
00:39:30.731    * Compute and memoize a jsx id from a basedId and optionally props.
00:39:30.731    */ function computeId(baseId, props) {
00:39:30.731   if (!props) {
00:39:30.731   return "jsx-" + baseId;
00:39:30.731   }
00:39:30.731   var propsToString = String(props);
00:39:30.731   var key = baseId + propsToString;
00:39:30.731   if (!cache[key]) {
00:39:30.731   cache[key] = "jsx-" + stringHash(baseId + "-" + propsToString);
00:39:30.731   }
00:39:30.731   return cache[key];
00:39:30.731   }
00:39:30.731   /**
00:39:30.731    * computeSelector
00:39:30.731    *
00:39:30.731    * Compute and memoize dynamic selectors.
00:39:30.731    */ function computeSelector(id, css) {
00:39:30.731   var selectoPlaceholderRegexp = /__jsx-style-dynamic-selector/g;
00:39:30.731   // Sanitize SSR-ed CSS.
00:39:30.731   // Client side code doesn't need to be sanitized since we use
00:39:30.731   // document.createTextNode (dev) and the CSSOM api sheet.insertRule (prod).
00:39:30.731   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
00:39:30.731   css = sanitize(css);
00:39:30.731   }
00:39:30.731   var idcss = id + css;
00:39:30.731   if (!cache[idcss]) {
00:39:30.731   cache[idcss] = css.replace(selectoPlaceholderRegexp, id);
00:39:30.731   }
00:39:30.731   return cache[idcss];
00:39:30.731   }
00:39:30.731   function mapRulesToStyle(cssRules, options) {
00:39:30.731   if (options === void 0) options = {};
00:39:30.731   return cssRules.map(function(args) {
00:39:30.731   var id = args[0];
00:39:30.731   var css = args[1];
00:39:30.731   return /*#__PURE__*/ React__default["default"].createElement("style", {
00:39:30.731   id: "__" + id,
00:39:30.731   // Avoid warnings upon render with a key
00:39:30.731   key: "__" + id,
00:39:30.731   nonce: options.nonce ? options.nonce : undefined,
00:39:30.731   dangerouslySetInnerHTML: {
00:39:30.731   __html: css
00:39:30.731   }
00:39:30.731   });
00:39:30.731   });
00:39:30.731   }
00:39:30.731   var StyleSheetRegistry = /*#__PURE__*/ function() {
00:39:30.731   function StyleSheetRegistry(param) {
00:39:30.731   var ref = param === void 0 ? {} : param, _styleSheet = ref.styleSheet, styleSheet = _styleSheet === void 0 ? null : _styleSheet, _optimizeForSpeed = ref.optimizeForSpeed, optimizeForSpeed = _optimizeForSpeed === void 0 ? false : _optimizeForSpeed;
00:39:30.731   this._sheet = styleSheet || new StyleSheet({
00:39:30.731   name: "styled-jsx",
00:39:30.731   optimizeForSpeed: optimizeForSpeed
00:39:30.731   });
00:39:30.731   this._sheet.inject();
00:39:30.731   if (styleSheet && typeof optimizeForSpeed === "boolean") {
00:39:30.731   this._sheet.setOptimizeForSpeed(optimizeForSpeed);
00:39:30.731   this._optimizeForSpeed = this._sheet.isOptimizeForSpeed();
00:39:30.731   }
00:39:30.731   this._fromServer = undefined;
00:39:30.731   this._indices = {};
00:39:30.731   this._instancesCounts = {};
00:39:30.732   }
00:39:30.732   var _proto = StyleSheetRegistry.prototype;
00:39:30.732   _proto.add = function add(props) {
00:39:30.732   var _this = this;
00:39:30.732   if (undefined === this._optimizeForSpeed) {
00:39:30.732   this._optimizeForSpeed = Array.isArray(props.children);
00:39:30.732   this._sheet.setOptimizeForSpeed(this._optimizeForSpeed);
00:39:30.732   this._optimizeForSpeed = this._sheet.isOptimizeForSpeed();
00:39:30.732   }
00:39:30.732   if (typeof window !== "undefined" && !this._fromServer) {
00:39:30.732   this._fromServer = this.selectFromServer();
00:39:30.732   this._instancesCounts = Object.keys(this._fromServer).reduce(function(acc, tagName) {
00:39:30.733   acc[tagName] = 0;
00:39:30.733   return acc;
00:39:30.733   }, {});
00:39:30.733   }
00:39:30.733   var ref = this.getIdAndRules(props), styleId = ref.styleId, rules = ref.rules;
00:39:30.733   // Deduping: just increase the instances count.
00:39:30.733   if (styleId in this._instancesCounts) {
00:39:30.733   this._instancesCounts[styleId] += 1;
00:39:30.733   return;
00:39:30.733   }
00:39:30.733   var indices = rules.map(function(rule) {
00:39:30.733   return _this._sheet.insertRule(rule);
00:39:30.733   }) // Filter out invalid rules
00:39:30.733   .filter(function(index) {
00:39:30.733   return index !== -1;
00:39:30.733   });
00:39:30.733   this._indices[styleId] = indices;
00:39:30.733   this._instancesCounts[styleId] = 1;
00:39:30.733   };
00:39:30.733   _proto.remove = function remove(props) {
00:39:30.733   var _this = this;
00:39:30.733   var styleId = this.getIdAndRules(props).styleId;
00:39:30.733   invariant(styleId in this._instancesCounts, "styleId: `" + styleId + "` not found");
00:39:30.733   this._instancesCounts[styleId] -= 1;
00:39:30.733   if (this._instancesCounts[styleId] < 1) {
00:39:30.733   var tagFromServer = this._fromServer && this._fromServer[styleId];
00:39:30.733   if (tagFromServer) {
00:39:30.733   tagFromServer.parentNode.removeChild(tagFromServer);
00:39:30.733   delete this._fromServer[styleId];
00:39:30.733   } else {
00:39:30.734   this._indices[styleId].forEach(function(index) {
00:39:30.734   return _this._sheet.deleteRule(index);
00:39:30.734   });
00:39:30.734   delete this._indices[styleId];
00:39:30.734   }
00:39:30.734   delete this._instancesCounts[styleId];
00:39:30.734   }
00:39:30.734   };
00:39:30.734   _proto.update = function update(props, nextProps) {
00:39:30.734   this.add(nextProps);
00:39:30.734   this.remove(props);
00:39:30.734   };
00:39:30.734   _proto.flush = function flush() {
00:39:30.734   this._sheet.flush();
00:39:30.734   this._sheet.inject();
00:39:30.734   this._fromServer = undefined;
00:39:30.734   this._indices = {};
00:39:30.734   this._instancesCounts = {};
00:39:30.734   };
00:39:30.734   _proto.cssRules = function cssRules() {
00:39:30.734   var _this = this;
00:39:30.734   var fromServer = this._fromServer ? Object.keys(this._fromServer).map(function(styleId) {
00:39:30.734   return [
00:39:30.734   styleId,
00:39:30.734   _this._fromServer[styleId]
00:39:30.734   ];
00:39:30.734   }) : [];
00:39:30.734   var cssRules = this._sheet.cssRules();
00:39:30.734   return fromServer.concat(Object.keys(this._indices).map(function(styleId) {
00:39:30.734   return [
00:39:30.734   styleId,
00:39:30.734   _this._indices[styleId].map(function(index) {
00:39:30.734   return cssRules[index].cssText;
00:39:30.734   }).join(_this._optimizeForSpeed ? "" : "\n")
00:39:30.734   ];
00:39:30.734   }) // filter out empty rules
00:39:30.734   .filter(function(rule) {
00:39:30.734   return Boolean(rule[1]);
00:39:30.734   }));
00:39:30.734   };
00:39:30.734   _proto.styles = function styles(options) {
00:39:30.734   return mapRulesToStyle(this.cssRules(), options);
00:39:30.734   };
00:39:30.734   _proto.getIdAndRules = function getIdAndRules(props) {
00:39:30.734   var css = props.children, dynamic = props.dynamic, id = props.id;
00:39:30.734   if (dynamic) {
00:39:30.734   var styleId = computeId(id, dynamic);
00:39:30.734   return {
00:39:30.734   styleId: styleId,
00:39:30.734   rules: Array.isArray(css) ? css.map(function(rule) {
00:39:30.734   return computeSelector(styleId, rule);
00:39:30.734   }) : [
00:39:30.734   computeSelector(styleId, css)
00:39:30.734   ]
00:39:30.734   };
00:39:30.734   }
00:39:30.735   return {
00:39:30.735   styleId: computeId(id),
00:39:30.735   rules: Array.isArray(css) ? css : [
00:39:30.735   css
00:39:30.735   ]
00:39:30.735   };
00:39:30.735   };
00:39:30.735   /**
00:39:30.735      * selectFromServer
00:39:30.735      *
00:39:30.735      * Collects style tags from the document with id __jsx-XXX
00:39:30.735      */ _proto.selectFromServer = function selectFromServer() {
00:39:30.735   var elements = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('[id^="__jsx-"]'));
00:39:30.735   return elements.reduce(function(acc, element) {
00:39:30.735   var id = element.id.slice(2);
00:39:30.735   acc[id] = element;
00:39:30.735   return acc;
00:39:30.735   }, {});
00:39:30.735   };
00:39:30.735   return StyleSheetRegistry;
00:39:30.735   }();
00:39:30.735   function invariant(condition, message) {
00:39:30.735   if (!condition) {
00:39:30.735   throw new Error("StyleSheetRegistry: " + message + ".");
00:39:30.735   }
00:39:30.735   }
00:39:30.735   var StyleSheetContext = /*#__PURE__*/ React.createContext(null);
00:39:30.735   StyleSheetContext.displayName = "StyleSheetContext";
00:39:30.735   function createStyleRegistry() {
00:39:30.735   return new StyleSheetRegistry();
00:39:30.735   }
00:39:30.735   function StyleRegistry(param) {
00:39:30.736   var configuredRegistry = param.registry, children = param.children;
00:39:30.736   var rootRegistry = React.useContext(StyleSheetContext);
00:39:30.736   var ref = React.useState(function() {
00:39:30.736   return rootRegistry || configuredRegistry || createStyleRegistry();
00:39:30.736   }), registry = ref[0];
00:39:30.736   return /*#__PURE__*/ React__default["default"].createElement(StyleSheetContext.Provider, {
00:39:30.736   value: registry
00:39:30.736   }, children);
00:39:30.736   }
00:39:30.736   function useStyleRegistry() {
00:39:30.736   return React.useContext(StyleSheetContext);
00:39:30.736   }
00:39:30.736   // Opt-into the new `useInsertionEffect` API in React 18, fallback to `useLayoutEffect`.
00:39:30.736   // https://github.com/reactwg/react-18/discussions/110
00:39:30.736   var useInsertionEffect = React__default["default"].useInsertionEffect || React__default["default"].useLayoutEffect;
00:39:30.736   var defaultRegistry = typeof window !== "undefined" ? createStyleRegistry() : undefined;
00:39:30.736   function JSXStyle(props) {
00:39:30.736   var registry = defaultRegistry ? defaultRegistry : useStyleRegistry();
00:39:30.737   // If `registry` does not exist, we do nothing here.
00:39:30.737   if (!registry) {
00:39:30.737   return null;
00:39:30.737   }
00:39:30.737   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
00:39:30.737   registry.add(props);
00:39:30.737   return null;
00:39:30.737   }
00:39:30.737   useInsertionEffect(function() {
00:39:30.737   registry.add(props);
00:39:30.738   return function() {
00:39:30.738   registry.remove(props);
00:39:30.738   };
00:39:30.738   // props.children can be string[], will be striped since id is identical
00:39:30.738   }, [
00:39:30.738   props.id,
00:39:30.738   String(props.dynamic)
00:39:30.738   ]);
00:39:30.738   return null;
00:39:30.738   }
00:39:30.738   JSXStyle.dynamic = function(info) {
00:39:30.738   return info.map(function(tagInfo) {
00:39:30.738   var baseId = tagInfo[0];
00:39:30.738   var props = tagInfo[1];
00:39:30.738   return computeId(baseId, props);
00:39:30.738   }).join(" ");
00:39:30.738   };
00:39:30.738   exports.StyleRegistry = StyleRegistry;
00:39:30.738   exports.createStyleRegistry = createStyleRegistry;
00:39:30.738   exports.style = JSXStyle;
00:39:30.738   exports.useStyleRegistry = useStyleRegistry;
00:39:30.738   }),
00:39:30.738   437902, ((__turbopack_context__, module, exports) => {
00:39:30.738   
00:39:30.738   module.exports = __turbopack_context__.r(898547).style;
00:39:30.738   }),

00:39:30.746   function NotificationToast({ toasts, onRemove }) {
00:39:30.746   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("div", {
00:39:30.746   className: " pointer-events-none fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 space-y-2 sm:top-6 sm:right-6 ",
00:39:30.746   children: toasts.map((t)=>/*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(Toast, {
00:39:30.746   toast: t,
00:39:30.746   onRemove: onRemove
00:39:30.746   }, t.id))
00:39:30.746   });
00:39:30.746   }
00:39:30.747   function Toast({ toast, onRemove }) {
00:39:30.747   const [isExiting, setIsExiting] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__1["useState"])(false);
00:39:30.747   (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__1["useEffect"])(()=>{
00:39:30.747   if (!toast.duration) return;
00:39:30.747   const timer = setTimeout(()=>{
00:39:30.747   setIsExiting(true);
00:39:30.747   setTimeout(()=>onRemove(toast.id), 300);
00:39:30.747   }, toast.duration);
00:39:30.747   return ()=>clearTimeout(timer);
00:39:30.747   }, [
00:39:30.747   toast.duration,
00:39:30.747   toast.id,
00:39:30.747   onRemove
00:39:30.747   ]);
00:39:30.747   const baseClasses = `
00:39:30.747       pointer-events-auto
00:39:30.747       flex items-start gap-3
00:39:30.748       rounded-lg border
00:39:30.748       px-4 py-3
00:39:30.748       shadow-lg backdrop-blur
00:39:30.748       transition-all duration-300
00:39:30.748       animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2
00:39:30.748       sm:px-5 sm:py-4
00:39:30.748     `;
00:39:30.748   const typeClasses = {
00:39:30.748   success: 'border-green-500/50 bg-green-950/80 text-green-300',
00:39:30.748   error: 'border-red-500/50 bg-red-950/80 text-red-300',
00:39:30.748   warning: 'border-blue-500/50 bg-blue-950/80 text-blue-300',
00:39:30.748   info: 'border-cyan-500/50 bg-cyan-950/80 text-cyan-300'
00:39:30.748   };
00:39:30.748   const iconProps = {
00:39:30.748   className: 'h-5 w-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5'
00:39:30.748   };
00:39:30.748   const icons = {
00:39:30.748   success: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__406321__["default"], {
00:39:30.748   ...iconProps
00:39:30.748   }),
00:39:30.748   error: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__1["AlertCircle"], {
00:39:30.748   ...iconProps
00:39:30.748   }),
00:39:30.748   warning: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__1["AlertCircle"], {
00:39:30.748   ...iconProps
00:39:30.748   }),
00:39:30.748   info: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__952571__["Info"], {
00:39:30.748   ...iconProps
00:39:30.748   })
00:39:30.748   };
00:39:30.748   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:30.748   className: `
00:39:30.748           ${baseClasses}
00:39:30.748           ${typeClasses[toast.type]}
00:39:30.748           ${isExiting ? 'slide-out-to-top-2 opacity-0' : ''}
00:39:30.748         `,
00:39:30.748   children: [
00:39:30.748   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("div", {
00:39:30.748   className: "flex-shrink-0",
00:39:30.748   children: icons[toast.type]
00:39:30.748   }),
00:39:30.748   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:30.748   className: " flex-1 text-sm sm:text-base ",
00:39:30.749   children: [
00:39:30.749   toast.message,
00:39:30.749   toast.subtitle && /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("p", {
00:39:30.749   className: "mt-1 text-xs opacity-80",
00:39:30.749   children: toast.subtitle
00:39:30.749   })
00:39:30.749   ]
00:39:30.749   }),
00:39:30.749   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("button", {
00:39:30.749   onClick: ()=>{
00:39:30.749   setIsExiting(true);
00:39:30.749   setTimeout(()=>onRemove(toast.id), 300);
00:39:30.749   },
00:39:30.749   className: " flex-shrink-0 text-current opacity-60 transition-opacity hover:opacity-100 ",
00:39:30.749   "aria-label": "Cerrar",
00:39:30.749   children: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__37727__["X"], {
00:39:30.749   className: "size-4"
00:39:30.749   })
00:39:30.749   })
00:39:30.749   ]
00:39:30.749   });
00:39:30.749   }
00:39:30.749   'use client';
00:39:30.749   ;
00:39:30.749   ;
00:39:30.749   ;
00:39:30.749   ;
00:39:30.749   ;
00:39:30.749   ;
00:39:30.749   function BuscarSuscripcionPage() {
00:39:30.749   const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])('');
00:39:30.749   const [searchType, setSearchType] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])('email');
00:39:30.749   const [loading, setLoading] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(false);
00:39:30.749   const [actionType, setActionType] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
00:39:30.749   const [result, setResult] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
00:39:30.749   const [error, setError] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
00:39:30.749   const [esp32Message, setEsp32Message] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
00:39:30.749   const [esp32MessageType, setEsp32MessageType] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])('success');
00:39:30.749   const [toasts, setToasts] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])([]);
00:39:30.749   (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useEffect"])(()=>{
00:39:30.749   document.body.classList.add('no-chrome');
00:39:30.750   document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
00:39:30.750   return ()=>{
00:39:30.750   document.body.classList.remove('no-chrome');
00:39:30.750   document.body.style.overflow = '';
00:39:30.750   };
00:39:30.750   }, []);
00:39:30.750   const addToast = (message, type, duration = 5000, subtitle)=>{
00:39:30.750   const id = `toast-${Date.now()}`;
00:39:30.750   setToasts((prev)=>[
00:39:30.750   ...prev,
00:39:30.750   {
00:39:30.750   id,
00:39:30.750   message,
00:39:30.750   type,
00:39:30.750   duration,
00:39:30.750   subtitle
00:39:30.750   }
00:39:30.750   ]);
00:39:30.750   };
00:39:30.750   const removeToast = (id)=>{
00:39:30.750   setToasts((prev)=>prev.filter((t)=>t.id !== id));
00:39:30.750   };
00:39:30.750   // Limpiar resultado después de 5 segundos de completar la acción
00:39:30.750   (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useEffect"])(()=>{
00:39:30.750   if (result && !loading) {
00:39:30.750   const timer = setTimeout(()=>{
00:39:30.750   setResult(null);
00:39:30.750   setSearchTerm('');
00:39:30.750   setEsp32Message(null);
00:39:30.750   }, 5000);
00:39:30.750   return ()=>clearTimeout(timer);
00:39:30.750   }
00:39:30.750   }, [
00:39:30.750   result,
00:39:30.750   loading
00:39:30.750   ]);
00:39:30.750   const handleRegister = async ()=>{
00:39:30.750   if (!searchTerm.trim()) {
00:39:30.750   setError('Por favor ingresa un término de búsqueda');
00:39:30.750   return;
00:39:30.750   }
00:39:30.750   setLoading(true);
00:39:30.750   setError(null);
00:39:30.750   setResult(null);
00:39:30.750   setEsp32Message(null);
00:39:30.750   try {
00:39:30.752   // Paso 1: Buscar usuario
00:39:30.752   const searchResponse = await fetch('/api/super-admin/search-user', {
00:39:30.752   method: 'POST',
00:39:30.752   headers: {
00:39:30.752   'Content-Type': 'application/json'
00:39:30.752   },
00:39:30.752   body: JSON.stringify({
00:39:30.752   searchTerm: searchTerm.trim(),
00:39:30.752   searchType
00:39:30.752   })
00:39:30.752   });
00:39:30.752   const searchData = await searchResponse.json();
00:39:30.752   if (!searchResponse.ok) {
00:39:30.752   const errorMessage = typeof searchData === 'object' && searchData !== null && 'error' in searchData ? searchData.error : 'Error en la búsqueda';
00:39:30.752   throw new Error(errorMessage);
00:39:30.752   }
00:39:30.752   if (typeof searchData !== 'object' || searchData === null || !('found' in searchData)) {
00:39:30.752   throw new Error('Respuesta inválida del servidor');
00:39:30.752   }
00:39:30.752   const searchResult = searchData;
00:39:30.752   if (!searchResult.found) {
00:39:30.752   setResult(searchResult);
00:39:30.752   addToast('Usuario no encontrado', 'error', 4000, 'Verifica email, documento o nombre');
00:39:30.752   return;
00:39:30.752   }
00:39:30.752   // Usuario encontrado
00:39:30.752   setResult(searchResult);
00:39:30.752   const userId = searchResult.user?.id;
00:39:30.752   if (!userId) {
00:39:30.752   throw new Error('ID de usuario no disponible');
00:39:30.753   }
00:39:30.753   // Determinar si es entrada o salida
00:39:30.753   const type = searchResult.user?.hasOpenEntry ? 'exit' : 'entry';
00:39:30.753   setActionType(type);
00:39:30.753   // Paso 2: Registrar entrada o salida
00:39:30.753   const registerResponse = await fetch('/api/super-admin/register-access', {
00:39:30.753   method: 'POST',
00:39:30.753   headers: {
00:39:30.753   'Content-Type': 'application/json'
00:39:30.753   },
00:39:30.753   body: JSON.stringify({
00:39:30.753   userId,
00:39:30.753   action: type
00:39:30.753   })
00:39:30.753   });
00:39:30.753   const registerData = await registerResponse.json();
00:39:30.753   if (!registerResponse.ok) {
00:39:30.753   const errorMsg = typeof registerData === 'object' && registerData !== null && 'error' in registerData ? registerData.error : 'Error al registrar';
00:39:30.753   const errorDetails = typeof registerData === 'object' && registerData !== null && 'details' in registerData ? registerData.details : '';
00:39:30.753   setEsp32MessageType('error');
00:39:30.753   setEsp32Message(`⚠ ${errorMsg}`);
00:39:30.753   addToast(`Error: ${errorMsg}`, 'error', 6000, errorDetails);
00:39:30.753   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 6000);
00:39:30.753   return;
00:39:30.753   }
00:39:30.753   // Procesar respuesta exitosa
00:39:30.753   if (typeof registerData === 'object' && registerData !== null && 'success' in registerData && registerData.success) {
00:39:30.753   const data = registerData;
00:39:30.753   // Manejo de respuesta ESP32
00:39:30.753   if (data.esp32?.ok) {
00:39:30.753   setEsp32MessageType('success');
00:39:30.753   setEsp32Message(type === 'entry' ? '✓ Entrada registrada - Puerta abierta' : '✓ Salida registrada - Puerta abierta');
00:39:30.753   addToast(data.message, 'success', 5000, 'ESP32: Activo • Acceso permitido');
00:39:30.753   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 5000);
00:39:30.753   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'timeout') {
00:39:30.753   setEsp32MessageType('error');
00:39:30.753   setEsp32Message('⚠ Timeout: ESP32 no responde');
00:39:30.753   addToast(data.message, type === 'exit' ? 'warning' : 'error', 6000, 'ESP32: Timeout (5000ms)');
00:39:30.753   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 6000);
00:39:30.753   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'error') {
00:39:30.753   setEsp32MessageType('error');
00:39:30.753   setEsp32Message('⚠ Error conectando a ESP32');
00:39:30.753   addToast(data.message, type === 'exit' ? 'warning' : 'error', 6000, 'ESP32: Error de conexión');
00:39:30.753   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 6000);
00:39:30.753   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'not_configured') {
00:39:30.753   setEsp32MessageType('warning');
00:39:30.753   setEsp32Message('ℹ ESP32 no configurado');
00:39:30.753   addToast(data.message, 'warning', 4000, 'ESP32: No configurado');
00:39:30.753   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 4000);
00:39:30.753   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'inactive') {
00:39:30.753   setEsp32MessageType('warning');
00:39:30.753   setEsp32Message(type === 'exit' ? '✓ Salida registrada (suscripción inactiva)' : '⚠ Suscripción inactiva');
00:39:30.753   addToast(data.message, type === 'exit' ? 'success' : 'warning', 5000, type === 'exit' ? 'Salida permitida sin ESP32' : 'Acceso denegado');
00:39:30.753   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 5000);
00:39:30.753   } else {
00:39:30.753   setEsp32MessageType('success');
00:39:30.753   setEsp32Message(`✓ ${type === 'entry' ? 'Entrada' : 'Salida'} registrada`);
00:39:30.754   addToast(data.message, 'success', 4000);
00:39:30.754   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 4000);
00:39:30.754   }
00:39:30.754   }
00:39:30.754   } catch (err) {
00:39:30.754   const errorMsg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Error al registrar acceso';
00:39:30.754   setError(errorMsg);
00:39:30.754   addToast('Error al registrar acceso', 'error', 5000, errorMsg);
00:39:30.754   } finally{
00:39:30.754   setLoading(false);
00:39:30.754   setActionType(null);
00:39:30.754   }
00:39:30.754   };
00:39:30.754   const renderResult = ()=>{
00:39:30.754   if (!result) return null;
00:39:30.754   if (!result.found) {
00:39:30.754   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("div", {
00:39:30.754   className: " xs:mt-5 xs:p-4 mt-4 rounded-lg border border-red-500/30 bg-red-950/20 p-3 sm:mt-6 sm:p-6 ",
00:39:30.754   children: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:30.754   className: " xs:gap-3 flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:gap-4 ",
00:39:30.754   children: [
00:39:30.754   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__["AlertCircle"], {
00:39:30.754   className: " xs:h-6 xs:w-6 size-5 flex-shrink-0 text-red-400 sm:size-6 "
00:39:30.754   }),
00:39:30.754   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:30.754   className: "flex-1",
00:39:30.754   children: [
00:39:30.754   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("h3", {
00:39:30.754   className: " xs:text-base text-sm font-semibold text-red-400 sm:text-lg ",
00:39:30.754   children: "Usuario no encontrado"
00:39:30.754   }),
00:39:30.754   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("p", {
00:39:30.754   className: " xs:text-xs mt-1 text-xs text-gray-400 sm:text-sm ",
00:39:30.754   children: result.message ?? 'No se encontró ningún usuario con los datos proporcionados'
00:39:30.754   })
00:39:30.754   ]
00:39:30.754   })
00:39:30.754   ]
00:39:30.754   })
00:39:30.754   });
00:39:30.754   }
00:39:30.754   const { user } = result;
00:39:30.754   const isActive = user?.subscriptionStatus === 'active';
00:39:30.754   const daysRemaining = user?.daysRemaining ?? 0;
00:39:30.754   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:30.754   className: " xs:mt-5 xs:space-y-3 mt-4 space-y-2 sm:mt-6 sm:space-y-4 md:space-y-5 ",
00:39:30.754   children: [
00:39:30.754   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:30.754   className: " xs:p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-700 bg-gray-800/50 p-3 sm:p-6 ",
00:39:30.754   children: [
00:39:30.754   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("h3", {
00:39:30.754   className: " xs:mb-3 xs:text-lg mb-2 text-base font-bold text-cyan-400 sm:mb-4 sm:text-xl ",
00:39:30.754   children: "Información del Usuario"
00:39:30.754   }),
00:39:30.754   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:30.754   className: " xs:space-y-2 xs:text-sm space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-300 sm:text-base ",
00:39:30.754   children: [
00:39:30.754   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("p", {
00:39:30.755   className: "break-words",
00:39:30.755   children: [
00:39:30.755   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("span", {
00:39:30.755   className: "font-semibold text-gray-400",
00:39:30.755   children: "Nombre:"
00:39:30.755   }),
00:39:30.756   ' ',
00:39:30.756   user?.name ?? 'N/A'
00:39:30.756   ]
00:39:30.756   }),
00:39:30.756   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("p", {

00:39:30.756   children: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {

00:39:30.756   children: [
00:39:30.756   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__406321__["default"], {

00:39:30.756   }),
00:39:30.756   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {

00:39:30.756   children: [
00:39:30.756   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("h3", {
00:39:30.756   className: " xs:mb-2 xs:text-base mb-2 text-sm font-semibold text-green-400 sm:text-lg ",

00:39:30.756   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {

00:39:30.756   children: [
00:39:30.756   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:30.756   className: "flex items-center gap-2",
00:39:30.756   children: [
00:39:30.756   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__503116__["Clock"], {
00:39:30.756   className: " xs:h-4 xs:w-4 size-3.5 flex-shrink-0 text-cyan-400 sm:size-5 "
00:39:30.756   }),
00:39:30.756   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("span", {
00:39:30.756   className: " xs:text-xs text-xs sm:text-sm ",
00:39:30.756   children: [
00:39:30.756   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("span", {
00:39:30.756   className: "font-semibold text-cyan-400",
00:39:30.756   children: daysRemaining
00:39:30.756   }),
00:39:30.757   ' ',
00:39:30.757   daysRemaining === 1 ? 'día restante' : 'días restantes'
00:39:30.757   ]
00:39:30.757   })
00:39:30.757   ]
00:39:30.757   }),
00:39:30.757   user?.subscriptionEndDate && /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("p", {
00:39:30.757   className: " xs:text-xs text-xs text-gray-400 sm:text-sm ",
00:39:30.757   children: [
00:39:30.757   "Vence el:",

00:39:31.884   
00:39:31.884   }),
00:39:31.884   898547, ((__turbopack_context__, module, exports) => {
00:39:31.884

00:39:31.885   var React = __turbopack_context__.r(271645);
00:39:31.885   function _interopDefaultLegacy(e) {

00:39:31.885   'default': e

00:39:31.885   /*

00:39:31.885   */ function _defineProperties(target, props) {
00:39:31.885   for(var i = 0; i < props.length; i++){
00:39:31.885   var descriptor = props[i];
00:39:31.885   descriptor.enumerable = descriptor.enumerable || false;
00:39:31.885   descriptor.configurable = true;
00:39:31.885   if ("value" in descriptor) descriptor.writable = true;
00:39:31.885   Object.defineProperty(target, descriptor.key, descriptor);
00:39:31.885   }
00:39:31.885   }
00:39:31.885   function _createClass(Constructor, protoProps, staticProps) {
00:39:31.885   if (protoProps) _defineProperties(Constructor.prototype, protoProps);
00:39:31.885   if (staticProps) _defineProperties(Constructor, staticProps);
00:39:31.885   return Constructor;
00:39:31.885   }
00:39:31.885   var isProd = typeof __TURBOPACK__imported__module__247167__["default"] !== "undefined" && __TURBOPACK__imported__module__247167__["default"].env && ("TURBOPACK compile-time value", "production") === "production";
00:39:31.885   var isString = function(o) {
00:39:31.885   return Object.prototype.toString.call(o) === "[object String]";
00:39:31.885   };
00:39:31.885   var StyleSheet = /*#__PURE__*/ function() {
00:39:31.885   function StyleSheet(param) {
00:39:31.885   var ref = param === void 0 ? {} : param, _name = ref.name, name = _name === void 0 ? "stylesheet" : _name, _optimizeForSpeed = ref.optimizeForSpeed, optimizeForSpeed = _optimizeForSpeed === void 0 ? isProd : _optimizeForSpeed;
00:39:31.886   invariant$1(isString(name), "`name` must be a string");
00:39:31.886   this._name = name;
00:39:31.886   this._deletedRulePlaceholder = "#" + name + "-deleted-rule____{}";
00:39:31.886   invariant$1(typeof optimizeForSpeed === "boolean", "`optimizeForSpeed` must be a boolean");
00:39:31.886   this._optimizeForSpeed = optimizeForSpeed;
00:39:31.886   this._serverSheet = undefined;
00:39:31.886   this._tags = [];
00:39:31.886   this._injected = false;
00:39:31.886   this._rulesCount = 0;

00:39:31.886   this._nonce = node ? node.getAttribute("content") : null;
00:39:31.886   }
00:39:31.886   var _proto = StyleSheet.prototype;
00:39:31.886   _proto.setOptimizeForSpeed = function setOptimizeForSpeed(bool) {
00:39:31.886   invariant$1(typeof bool === "boolean", "`setOptimizeForSpeed` accepts a boolean");
00:39:31.886   invariant$1(this._rulesCount === 0, "optimizeForSpeed cannot be when rules have already been inserted");
00:39:31.886   this.flush();
00:39:31.886   this._optimizeForSpeed = bool;
00:39:31.886   this.inject();
00:39:31.886   };
00:39:31.886   _proto.isOptimizeForSpeed = function isOptimizeForSpeed() {
00:39:31.886   return this._optimizeForSpeed;
00:39:31.886   };
00:39:31.886   _proto.inject = function inject() {
00:39:31.886   var _this = this;
00:39:31.886   invariant$1(!this._injected, "sheet already injected");
00:39:31.886   this._injected = true;
00:39:31.886   if (typeof window !== "undefined" && this._optimizeForSpeed) {
00:39:31.886   this._tags[0] = this.makeStyleTag(this._name);
00:39:31.886   this._optimizeForSpeed = "insertRule" in this.getSheet();
00:39:31.886   if (!this._optimizeForSpeed) {
00:39:31.886   if (!isProd) {
00:39:31.887   console.warn("StyleSheet: optimizeForSpeed mode not supported falling back to standard mode.");
00:39:31.887   }
00:39:31.887   this.flush();
00:39:31.887   this._injected = true;
00:39:31.887   }
00:39:31.887   return;
00:39:31.887   }
00:39:31.887   this._serverSheet = {
00:39:31.887   cssRules: [],
00:39:31.887   insertRule: function(rule, index) {
00:39:31.887   if (typeof index === "number") {
00:39:31.887   _this._serverSheet.cssRules[index] = {
00:39:31.887   cssText: rule
00:39:31.887   };
00:39:31.887   } else {
00:39:31.887   _this._serverSheet.cssRules.push({
00:39:31.887   cssText: rule
00:39:31.887   });
00:39:31.887   }
00:39:31.887   return index;
00:39:31.887   },
00:39:31.887   deleteRule: function(index) {
00:39:31.887   _this._serverSheet.cssRules[index] = null;
00:39:31.887   }
00:39:31.887   };
00:39:31.887   };
00:39:31.887   _proto.getSheetForTag = function getSheetForTag(tag) {
00:39:31.887   if (tag.sheet) {
00:39:31.887   return tag.sheet;
00:39:31.887   }
00:39:31.887   // this weirdness brought to you by firefox
00:39:31.888   for(var i = 0; i < document.styleSheets.length; i++){
00:39:31.888   if (document.styleSheets[i].ownerNode === tag) {
00:39:31.888   return document.styleSheets[i];
00:39:31.888   }
00:39:31.888   }
00:39:31.888   };
00:39:31.888   _proto.getSheet = function getSheet() {
00:39:31.888   return this.getSheetForTag(this._tags[this._tags.length - 1]);
00:39:31.888   };
00:39:31.888   _proto.insertRule = function insertRule(rule, index) {
00:39:31.888   invariant$1(isString(rule), "`insertRule` accepts only strings");
00:39:31.888   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
00:39:31.888   if (typeof index !== "number") {
00:39:31.888   index = this._serverSheet.cssRules.length;
00:39:31.888   }
00:39:31.888   this._serverSheet.insertRule(rule, index);
00:39:31.888   return this._rulesCount++;
00:39:31.888   }
00:39:31.888   if (this._optimizeForSpeed) {
00:39:31.888   var sheet = this.getSheet();
00:39:31.888   if (typeof index !== "number") {
00:39:31.888   index = sheet.cssRules.length;
00:39:31.888   }
00:39:31.888   // this weirdness for perf, and chrome's weird bug
00:39:31.888   // https://stackoverflow.com/questions/20007992/chrome-suddenly-stopped-accepting-insertrule
00:39:31.888   try {
00:39:31.888   sheet.insertRule(rule, index);
00:39:31.888   } catch (error) {
00:39:31.888   if (!isProd) {
00:39:31.888   console.warn("StyleSheet: illegal rule: \n\n" + rule + "\n\nSee https://stackoverflow.com/q/20007992 for more info");
00:39:31.888   }
00:39:31.889   return -1;
00:39:31.889   }
00:39:31.889   } else {
00:39:31.889   var insertionPoint = this._tags[index];
00:39:31.889   this._tags.push(this.makeStyleTag(this._name, rule, insertionPoint));
00:39:31.889   }
00:39:31.889   return this._rulesCount++;
00:39:31.889   };
00:39:31.889   _proto.replaceRule = function replaceRule(index, rule) {
00:39:31.889   if (this._optimizeForSpeed || typeof window === "undefined") {
00:39:31.889   var sheet = typeof window !== "undefined" ? this.getSheet() : this._serverSheet;
00:39:31.889   if (!rule.trim()) {
00:39:31.889   rule = this._deletedRulePlaceholder;
00:39:31.889   }
00:39:31.889   if (!sheet.cssRules[index]) {
00:39:31.889   // @TBD Should we throw an error?
00:39:31.889   return index;
00:39:31.889   }
00:39:31.889   sheet.deleteRule(index);
00:39:31.889   try {
00:39:31.889   sheet.insertRule(rule, index);
00:39:31.889   } catch (error) {
00:39:31.889   if (!isProd) {
00:39:31.889   console.warn("StyleSheet: illegal rule: \n\n" + rule + "\n\nSee https://stackoverflow.com/q/20007992 for more info");
00:39:31.889   }
00:39:31.889   // In order to preserve the indices we insert a deleteRulePlaceholder
00:39:31.889   sheet.insertRule(this._deletedRulePlaceholder, index);
00:39:31.889   }
00:39:31.889   } else {
00:39:31.889   var tag = this._tags[index];
00:39:31.889   invariant$1(tag, "old rule at index `" + index + "` not found");
00:39:31.889   tag.textContent = rule;
00:39:31.890   }
00:39:31.890   return index;
00:39:31.890   };
00:39:31.890   _proto.deleteRule = function deleteRule(index) {
00:39:31.890   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
00:39:31.890   this._serverSheet.deleteRule(index);
00:39:31.890   return;
00:39:31.890   }
00:39:31.890   if (this._optimizeForSpeed) {
00:39:31.890   this.replaceRule(index, "");
00:39:31.890   } else {
00:39:31.890   var tag = this._tags[index];
00:39:31.890   invariant$1(tag, "rule at index `" + index + "` not found");
00:39:31.890   tag.parentNode.removeChild(tag);
00:39:31.890   this._tags[index] = null;
00:39:31.890   }
00:39:31.890   };
00:39:31.890   _proto.flush = function flush() {
00:39:31.890   this._injected = false;
00:39:31.890   this._rulesCount = 0;
00:39:31.890   if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
00:39:31.890   this._tags.forEach(function(tag) {
00:39:31.890   return tag && tag.parentNode.removeChild(tag);
00:39:31.890   });
00:39:31.890   this._tags = [];
00:39:31.890   } else {
00:39:31.890   // simpler on server
00:39:31.891   this._serverSheet.cssRules = [];
00:39:31.891   }
00:39:31.891   };
00:39:31.891   _proto.cssRules = function cssRules() {
00:39:31.891   var _this = this;
00:39:31.891   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
00:39:31.891   return this._serverSheet.cssRules;
00:39:31.891   }
00:39:31.891   return this._tags.reduce(function(rules, tag) {
00:39:31.891   if (tag) {
00:39:31.891   rules = rules.concat(Array.prototype.map.call(_this.getSheetForTag(tag).cssRules, function(rule) {
00:39:31.891   return rule.cssText === _this._deletedRulePlaceholder ? null : rule;
00:39:31.891   }));
00:39:31.891   } else {
00:39:31.891   rules.push(null);
00:39:31.891   }
00:39:31.891   return rules;
00:39:31.891   }, []);
00:39:31.891   };
00:39:31.891   _proto.makeStyleTag = function makeStyleTag(name, cssString, relativeToTag) {
00:39:31.891   if (cssString) {
00:39:31.891   invariant$1(isString(cssString), "makeStyleTag accepts only strings as second parameter");
00:39:31.892   }
00:39:31.892   var tag = document.createElement("style");
00:39:31.892   if (this._nonce) tag.setAttribute("nonce", this._nonce);
00:39:31.892   tag.type = "text/css";
00:39:31.892   tag.setAttribute("data-" + name, "");
00:39:31.892   if (cssString) {
00:39:31.892   tag.appendChild(document.createTextNode(cssString));
00:39:31.892   }
00:39:31.892   var head = document.head || document.getElementsByTagName("head")[0];
00:39:31.892   if (relativeToTag) {
00:39:31.892   head.insertBefore(tag, relativeToTag);
00:39:31.892   } else {
00:39:31.892   head.appendChild(tag);
00:39:31.892   }
00:39:31.892   return tag;
00:39:31.892   };
00:39:31.892   _createClass(StyleSheet, [
00:39:31.892   {
00:39:31.892   key: "length",
00:39:31.892   get: function get() {
00:39:31.892   return this._rulesCount;
00:39:31.892   }
00:39:31.892   }
00:39:31.892   ]);
00:39:31.892   return StyleSheet;
00:39:31.892   }();
00:39:31.892   function invariant$1(condition, message) {
00:39:31.892   if (!condition) {
00:39:31.892   throw new Error("StyleSheet: " + message + ".");
00:39:31.892   }
00:39:31.892   }
00:39:31.892   function hash(str) {
00:39:31.892   var _$hash = 5381, i = str.length;
00:39:31.892   while(i){
00:39:31.892   _$hash = _$hash * 33 ^ str.charCodeAt(--i);
00:39:31.892   }
00:39:31.892   /* JavaScript does bitwise operations (like XOR, above) on 32-bit signed
00:39:31.892      * integers. Since we want the results to be always positive, convert the
00:39:31.892      * signed int to an unsigned by doing an unsigned bitshift. */ return _$hash >>> 0;
00:39:31.892   }
00:39:31.892   var stringHash = hash;
00:39:31.892   var sanitize = function(rule) {
00:39:31.892   return rule.replace(/\/style/gi, "\\/style");
00:39:31.892   };
00:39:31.893   var cache = {};
00:39:31.893   /**
00:39:31.893    * computeId
00:39:31.893    *
00:39:31.893    * Compute and memoize a jsx id from a basedId and optionally props.
00:39:31.893    */ function computeId(baseId, props) {
00:39:31.893   if (!props) {
00:39:31.893   return "jsx-" + baseId;
00:39:31.893   }
00:39:31.893   var propsToString = String(props);
00:39:31.893   var key = baseId + propsToString;
00:39:31.893   if (!cache[key]) {
00:39:31.893   cache[key] = "jsx-" + stringHash(baseId + "-" + propsToString);
00:39:31.893   }
00:39:31.893   return cache[key];
00:39:31.893   }
00:39:31.893   /**
00:39:31.893    * computeSelector
00:39:31.893    *
00:39:31.893    * Compute and memoize dynamic selectors.
00:39:31.893    */ function computeSelector(id, css) {
00:39:31.893   var selectoPlaceholderRegexp = /__jsx-style-dynamic-selector/g;
00:39:31.893   // Sanitize SSR-ed CSS.
00:39:31.893   // Client side code doesn't need to be sanitized since we use
00:39:31.893   // document.createTextNode (dev) and the CSSOM api sheet.insertRule (prod).
00:39:31.893   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
00:39:31.893   css = sanitize(css);
00:39:31.893   }
00:39:31.893   var idcss = id + css;
00:39:31.893   if (!cache[idcss]) {
00:39:31.893   cache[idcss] = css.replace(selectoPlaceholderRegexp, id);
00:39:31.893   }
00:39:31.893   return cache[idcss];
00:39:31.893   }
00:39:31.893   function mapRulesToStyle(cssRules, options) {
00:39:31.893   if (options === void 0) options = {};
00:39:31.893   return cssRules.map(function(args) {
00:39:31.893   var id = args[0];
00:39:31.893   var css = args[1];
00:39:31.893   return /*#__PURE__*/ React__default["default"].createElement("style", {
00:39:31.893   id: "__" + id,
00:39:31.893   // Avoid warnings upon render with a key
00:39:31.893   key: "__" + id,
00:39:31.893   nonce: options.nonce ? options.nonce : undefined,
00:39:31.893   dangerouslySetInnerHTML: {
00:39:31.894   __html: css
00:39:31.894   }
00:39:31.894   });
00:39:31.894   });
00:39:31.894   }
00:39:31.894   var StyleSheetRegistry = /*#__PURE__*/ function() {
00:39:31.894   function StyleSheetRegistry(param) {
00:39:31.894   var ref = param === void 0 ? {} : param, _styleSheet = ref.styleSheet, styleSheet = _styleSheet === void 0 ? null : _styleSheet, _optimizeForSpeed = ref.optimizeForSpeed, optimizeForSpeed = _optimizeForSpeed === void 0 ? false : _optimizeForSpeed;
00:39:31.894   this._sheet = styleSheet || new StyleSheet({
00:39:31.894   name: "styled-jsx",
00:39:31.894   optimizeForSpeed: optimizeForSpeed
00:39:31.894   });
00:39:31.894   this._sheet.inject();
00:39:31.894   if (styleSheet && typeof optimizeForSpeed === "boolean") {
00:39:31.894   this._sheet.setOptimizeForSpeed(optimizeForSpeed);
00:39:31.894   this._optimizeForSpeed = this._sheet.isOptimizeForSpeed();
00:39:31.894   }
00:39:31.894   this._fromServer = undefined;
00:39:31.894   this._indices = {};
00:39:31.894   this._instancesCounts = {};
00:39:31.894   }
00:39:31.894   var _proto = StyleSheetRegistry.prototype;
00:39:31.894   _proto.add = function add(props) {
00:39:31.894   var _this = this;
00:39:31.894   if (undefined === this._optimizeForSpeed) {
00:39:31.894   this._optimizeForSpeed = Array.isArray(props.children);
00:39:31.894   this._sheet.setOptimizeForSpeed(this._optimizeForSpeed);
00:39:31.894   this._optimizeForSpeed = this._sheet.isOptimizeForSpeed();
00:39:31.894   }
00:39:31.894   if (typeof window !== "undefined" && !this._fromServer) {
00:39:31.894   this._fromServer = this.selectFromServer();
00:39:31.894   this._instancesCounts = Object.keys(this._fromServer).reduce(function(acc, tagName) {
00:39:31.894   acc[tagName] = 0;
00:39:31.894   return acc;
00:39:31.894   }, {});
00:39:31.894   }
00:39:31.894   var ref = this.getIdAndRules(props), styleId = ref.styleId, rules = ref.rules;
00:39:31.894   // Deduping: just increase the instances count.
00:39:31.894   if (styleId in this._instancesCounts) {
00:39:31.894   this._instancesCounts[styleId] += 1;
00:39:31.894   return;
00:39:31.894   }
00:39:31.894   var indices = rules.map(function(rule) {
00:39:31.894   return _this._sheet.insertRule(rule);
00:39:31.895   }) // Filter out invalid rules
00:39:31.895   .filter(function(index) {
00:39:31.895   return index !== -1;
00:39:31.895   });
00:39:31.895   this._indices[styleId] = indices;
00:39:31.895   this._instancesCounts[styleId] = 1;
00:39:31.895   };
00:39:31.895   _proto.remove = function remove(props) {
00:39:31.895   var _this = this;
00:39:31.895   var styleId = this.getIdAndRules(props).styleId;
00:39:31.895   invariant(styleId in this._instancesCounts, "styleId: `" + styleId + "` not found");
00:39:31.895   this._instancesCounts[styleId] -= 1;
00:39:31.895   if (this._instancesCounts[styleId] < 1) {
00:39:31.895   var tagFromServer = this._fromServer && this._fromServer[styleId];
00:39:31.895   if (tagFromServer) {
00:39:31.895   tagFromServer.parentNode.removeChild(tagFromServer);
00:39:31.895   delete this._fromServer[styleId];
00:39:31.895   } else {
00:39:31.895   this._indices[styleId].forEach(function(index) {
00:39:31.895   return _this._sheet.deleteRule(index);
00:39:31.895   });
00:39:31.895   delete this._indices[styleId];
00:39:31.895   }
00:39:31.895   delete this._instancesCounts[styleId];
00:39:31.895   }
00:39:31.895   };
00:39:31.895   _proto.update = function update(props, nextProps) {
00:39:31.895   this.add(nextProps);
00:39:31.895   this.remove(props);
00:39:31.895   };
00:39:31.895   _proto.flush = function flush() {
00:39:31.895   this._sheet.flush();
00:39:31.895   this._sheet.inject();
00:39:31.895   this._fromServer = undefined;
00:39:31.895   this._indices = {};
00:39:31.895   this._instancesCounts = {};
00:39:31.895   };
00:39:31.895   _proto.cssRules = function cssRules() {
00:39:31.895   var _this = this;
00:39:31.895   var fromServer = this._fromServer ? Object.keys(this._fromServer).map(function(styleId) {
00:39:31.895   return [
00:39:31.895   styleId,
00:39:31.895   _this._fromServer[styleId]
00:39:31.895   ];
00:39:31.895   }) : [];
00:39:31.895   var cssRules = this._sheet.cssRules();
00:39:31.895   return fromServer.concat(Object.keys(this._indices).map(function(styleId) {
00:39:31.895   return [
00:39:31.895   styleId,
00:39:31.895   _this._indices[styleId].map(function(index) {
00:39:31.896   return cssRules[index].cssText;
00:39:31.896   }).join(_this._optimizeForSpeed ? "" : "\n")
00:39:31.896   ];
00:39:31.896   }) // filter out empty rules
00:39:31.896   .filter(function(rule) {
00:39:31.896   return Boolean(rule[1]);
00:39:31.896   }));
00:39:31.896   };
00:39:31.896   _proto.styles = function styles(options) {
00:39:31.896   return mapRulesToStyle(this.cssRules(), options);
00:39:31.896   };
00:39:31.896   _proto.getIdAndRules = function getIdAndRules(props) {
00:39:31.896   var css = props.children, dynamic = props.dynamic, id = props.id;
00:39:31.896   if (dynamic) {
00:39:31.896   var styleId = computeId(id, dynamic);
00:39:31.896   return {
00:39:31.896   styleId: styleId,
00:39:31.896   rules: Array.isArray(css) ? css.map(function(rule) {
00:39:31.896   return computeSelector(styleId, rule);
00:39:31.896   }) : [
00:39:31.896   computeSelector(styleId, css)
00:39:31.896   ]
00:39:31.896   };
00:39:31.896   }
00:39:31.896   return {
00:39:31.896   styleId: computeId(id),
00:39:31.896   rules: Array.isArray(css) ? css : [
00:39:31.896   css
00:39:31.896   ]
00:39:31.896   };
00:39:31.896   };
00:39:31.896   /**
00:39:31.896      * selectFromServer
00:39:31.896      *
00:39:31.896      * Collects style tags from the document with id __jsx-XXX
00:39:31.896      */ _proto.selectFromServer = function selectFromServer() {
00:39:31.896   var elements = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('[id^="__jsx-"]'));
00:39:31.896   return elements.reduce(function(acc, element) {
00:39:31.896   var id = element.id.slice(2);
00:39:31.896   acc[id] = element;
00:39:31.896   return acc;
00:39:31.896   }, {});
00:39:31.896   };
00:39:31.896   return StyleSheetRegistry;
00:39:31.896   }();
00:39:31.896   function invariant(condition, message) {
00:39:31.896   if (!condition) {
00:39:31.896   throw new Error("StyleSheetRegistry: " + message + ".");
00:39:31.896   }
00:39:31.896   }
00:39:31.896   var StyleSheetContext = /*#__PURE__*/ React.createContext(null);
00:39:31.897   StyleSheetContext.displayName = "StyleSheetContext";
00:39:31.897   function createStyleRegistry() {
00:39:31.897   return new StyleSheetRegistry();
00:39:31.897   }
00:39:31.897   function StyleRegistry(param) {
00:39:31.897   var configuredRegistry = param.registry, children = param.children;
00:39:31.897   var rootRegistry = React.useContext(StyleSheetContext);
00:39:31.897   var ref = React.useState(function() {
00:39:31.897   return rootRegistry || configuredRegistry || createStyleRegistry();
00:39:31.897   }), registry = ref[0];
00:39:31.897   return /*#__PURE__*/ React__default["default"].createElement(StyleSheetContext.Provider, {
00:39:31.897   value: registry
00:39:31.897   }, children);
00:39:31.897   }
00:39:31.897   function useStyleRegistry() {
00:39:31.897   return React.useContext(StyleSheetContext);
00:39:31.897   }
00:39:31.897   // Opt-into the new `useInsertionEffect` API in React 18, fallback to `useLayoutEffect`.
00:39:31.897   // https://github.com/reactwg/react-18/discussions/110
00:39:31.897   var useInsertionEffect = React__default["default"].useInsertionEffect || React__default["default"].useLayoutEffect;
00:39:31.897   var defaultRegistry = typeof window !== "undefined" ? createStyleRegistry() : undefined;
00:39:31.897   function JSXStyle(props) {
00:39:31.897   var registry = defaultRegistry ? defaultRegistry : useStyleRegistry();
00:39:31.898   // If `registry` does not exist, we do nothing here.
00:39:31.898   if (!registry) {
00:39:31.898   return null;
00:39:31.898   }
00:39:31.898   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
00:39:31.898   registry.add(props);
00:39:31.898   return null;
00:39:31.898   }
00:39:31.898   useInsertionEffect(function() {
00:39:31.898   registry.add(props);
00:39:31.898   return function() {
00:39:31.898   registry.remove(props);
00:39:31.898   };
00:39:31.898   // props.children can be string[], will be striped since id is identical
00:39:31.898   }, [
00:39:31.898   props.id,
00:39:31.898   String(props.dynamic)
00:39:31.898   ]);
00:39:31.898   return null;
00:39:31.898   }
00:39:31.898   JSXStyle.dynamic = function(info) {
00:39:31.898   return info.map(function(tagInfo) {
00:39:31.898   var baseId = tagInfo[0];
00:39:31.898   var props = tagInfo[1];
00:39:31.898   return computeId(baseId, props);
00:39:31.898   }).join(" ");
00:39:31.898   };
00:39:31.898   exports.StyleRegistry = StyleRegistry;
00:39:31.898   exports.createStyleRegistry = createStyleRegistry;
00:39:31.898   exports.style = JSXStyle;
00:39:31.898   exports.useStyleRegistry = useStyleRegistry;
00:39:31.898   }),
00:39:31.898   437902, ((__turbopack_context__, module, exports) => {
00:39:31.898   
00:39:31.898   module.exports = __turbopack_context__.r(898547).style;
00:39:31.898   }),

00:39:31.905   function NotificationToast({ toasts, onRemove }) {
00:39:31.905   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("div", {
00:39:31.905   className: " pointer-events-none fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 space-y-2 sm:top-6 sm:right-6 ",

00:39:31.905   toast: t,
00:39:31.905   onRemove: onRemove
00:39:31.905   }, t.id))
00:39:31.905   });
00:39:31.905   }
00:39:31.905   function Toast({ toast, onRemove }) {
00:39:31.905   const [isExiting, setIsExiting] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__1["useState"])(false);
00:39:31.905   (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__1["useEffect"])(()=>{
00:39:31.905   if (!toast.duration) return;
00:39:31.905   const timer = setTimeout(()=>{
00:39:31.905   setIsExiting(true);
00:39:31.905   setTimeout(()=>onRemove(toast.id), 300);
00:39:31.905   }, toast.duration);
00:39:31.905   return ()=>clearTimeout(timer);
00:39:31.905   }, [
00:39:31.905   toast.duration,
00:39:31.905   toast.id,
00:39:31.905   onRemove
00:39:31.905   ]);
00:39:31.905   const baseClasses = `
00:39:31.905       pointer-events-auto
00:39:31.905       flex items-start gap-3
00:39:31.905       rounded-lg border
00:39:31.905       px-4 py-3
00:39:31.905       shadow-lg backdrop-blur
00:39:31.905       transition-all duration-300
00:39:31.905       animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2
00:39:31.905       sm:px-5 sm:py-4
00:39:31.905     `;
00:39:31.905   const typeClasses = {
00:39:31.905   success: 'border-green-500/50 bg-green-950/80 text-green-300',
00:39:31.905   error: 'border-red-500/50 bg-red-950/80 text-red-300',
00:39:31.905   warning: 'border-blue-500/50 bg-blue-950/80 text-blue-300',
00:39:31.905   info: 'border-cyan-500/50 bg-cyan-950/80 text-cyan-300'
00:39:31.905   };
00:39:31.905   const iconProps = {
00:39:31.905   className: 'h-5 w-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5'
00:39:31.906   };
00:39:31.906   const icons = {
00:39:31.906   success: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__406321__["default"], {
00:39:31.906   ...iconProps
00:39:31.906   }),
00:39:31.906   error: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__1["AlertCircle"], {
00:39:31.906   ...iconProps
00:39:31.906   }),
00:39:31.906   warning: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__1["AlertCircle"], {
00:39:31.906   ...iconProps
00:39:31.906   }),
00:39:31.906   info: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__952571__["Info"], {
00:39:31.906   ...iconProps
00:39:31.906   })
00:39:31.906   };
00:39:31.906   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:31.906   className: `
00:39:31.906           ${baseClasses}
00:39:31.906           ${typeClasses[toast.type]}
00:39:31.906           ${isExiting ? 'slide-out-to-top-2 opacity-0' : ''}
00:39:31.906         `,
00:39:31.906   children: [
00:39:31.906   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("div", {
00:39:31.906   className: "flex-shrink-0",
00:39:31.906   children: icons[toast.type]
00:39:31.906   }),
00:39:31.906   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:31.906   className: " flex-1 text-sm sm:text-base ",
00:39:31.906   children: [
00:39:31.906   toast.message,
00:39:31.906   toast.subtitle && /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("p", {
00:39:31.906   className: "mt-1 text-xs opacity-80",
00:39:31.906   children: toast.subtitle
00:39:31.906   })
00:39:31.906   ]
00:39:31.906   }),
00:39:31.906   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("button", {
00:39:31.906   onClick: ()=>{
00:39:31.906   setIsExiting(true);
00:39:31.906   setTimeout(()=>onRemove(toast.id), 300);
00:39:31.906   },
00:39:31.906   className: " flex-shrink-0 text-current opacity-60 transition-opacity hover:opacity-100 ",
00:39:31.906   "aria-label": "Cerrar",
00:39:31.906   children: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__37727__["X"], {
00:39:31.906   className: "size-4"
00:39:31.906   })
00:39:31.906   })
00:39:31.907   ]
00:39:31.907   });
00:39:31.907   }
00:39:31.907   'use client';
00:39:31.907   ;
00:39:31.907   ;
00:39:31.907   ;
00:39:31.907   ;
00:39:31.907   ;
00:39:31.907   ;
00:39:31.907   function BuscarSuscripcionPage() {
00:39:31.907   const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])('');
00:39:31.907   const [searchType, setSearchType] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])('email');
00:39:31.907   const [loading, setLoading] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(false);
00:39:31.907   const [actionType, setActionType] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
00:39:31.907   const [result, setResult] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
00:39:31.907   const [error, setError] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
00:39:31.907   const [esp32Message, setEsp32Message] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
00:39:31.907   const [esp32MessageType, setEsp32MessageType] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])('success');
00:39:31.907   const [toasts, setToasts] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])([]);
00:39:31.907   (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useEffect"])(()=>{
00:39:31.907   document.body.classList.add('no-chrome');
00:39:31.907   document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
00:39:31.907   return ()=>{
00:39:31.907   document.body.classList.remove('no-chrome');
00:39:31.907   document.body.style.overflow = '';
00:39:31.907   };
00:39:31.907   }, []);
00:39:31.907   const addToast = (message, type, duration = 5000, subtitle)=>{
00:39:31.907   const id = `toast-${Date.now()}`;
00:39:31.907   setToasts((prev)=>[
00:39:31.907   ...prev,
00:39:31.907   {
00:39:31.907   id,
00:39:31.907   message,
00:39:31.907   type,
00:39:31.907   duration,
00:39:31.907   subtitle
00:39:31.907   }
00:39:31.907   ]);
00:39:31.907   };
00:39:31.907   const removeToast = (id)=>{
00:39:31.907   setToasts((prev)=>prev.filter((t)=>t.id !== id));
00:39:31.908   };
00:39:31.908   // Limpiar resultado después de 5 segundos de completar la acción
00:39:31.908   (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useEffect"])(()=>{
00:39:31.908   if (result && !loading) {
00:39:31.908   const timer = setTimeout(()=>{
00:39:31.908   setResult(null);
00:39:31.908   setSearchTerm('');
00:39:31.908   setEsp32Message(null);
00:39:31.908   }, 5000);
00:39:31.908   return ()=>clearTimeout(timer);
00:39:31.908   }
00:39:31.908   }, [
00:39:31.908   result,
00:39:31.908   loading
00:39:31.908   ]);
00:39:31.908   const handleRegister = async ()=>{
00:39:31.908   if (!searchTerm.trim()) {
00:39:31.908   setError('Por favor ingresa un término de búsqueda');
00:39:31.908   return;
00:39:31.908   }
00:39:31.908   setLoading(true);
00:39:31.908   setError(null);
00:39:31.908   setResult(null);
00:39:31.908   setEsp32Message(null);
00:39:31.908   try {
00:39:31.908   // Paso 1: Buscar usuario
00:39:31.908   const searchResponse = await fetch('/api/super-admin/search-user', {
00:39:31.908   method: 'POST',
00:39:31.908   headers: {
00:39:31.908   'Content-Type': 'application/json'
00:39:31.908   },
00:39:31.908   body: JSON.stringify({
00:39:31.908   searchTerm: searchTerm.trim(),
00:39:31.908   searchType
00:39:31.908   })
00:39:31.908   });
00:39:31.908   const searchData = await searchResponse.json();
00:39:31.908   if (!searchResponse.ok) {
00:39:31.908   const errorMessage = typeof searchData === 'object' && searchData !== null && 'error' in searchData ? searchData.error : 'Error en la búsqueda';
00:39:31.908   throw new Error(errorMessage);
00:39:31.908   }
00:39:31.908   if (typeof searchData !== 'object' || searchData === null || !('found' in searchData)) {
00:39:31.908   throw new Error('Respuesta inválida del servidor');
00:39:31.908   }
00:39:31.908   const searchResult = searchData;
00:39:31.908   if (!searchResult.found) {
00:39:31.908   setResult(searchResult);
00:39:31.908   addToast('Usuario no encontrado', 'error', 4000, 'Verifica email, documento o nombre');
00:39:31.908   return;
00:39:31.908   }
00:39:31.908   // Usuario encontrado
00:39:31.908   setResult(searchResult);
00:39:31.908   const userId = searchResult.user?.id;
00:39:31.908   if (!userId) {
00:39:31.908   throw new Error('ID de usuario no disponible');
00:39:31.908   }
00:39:31.908   // Determinar si es entrada o salida
00:39:31.908   const type = searchResult.user?.hasOpenEntry ? 'exit' : 'entry';
00:39:31.908   setActionType(type);
00:39:31.908   // Paso 2: Registrar entrada o salida
00:39:31.908   const registerResponse = await fetch('/api/super-admin/register-access', {
00:39:31.908   method: 'POST',
00:39:31.908   headers: {
00:39:31.909   'Content-Type': 'application/json'
00:39:31.909   },
00:39:31.909   body: JSON.stringify({
00:39:31.909   userId,
00:39:31.909   action: type
00:39:31.909   })
00:39:31.909   });
00:39:31.909   const registerData = await registerResponse.json();
00:39:31.909   if (!registerResponse.ok) {
00:39:31.909   const errorMsg = typeof registerData === 'object' && registerData !== null && 'error' in registerData ? registerData.error : 'Error al registrar';
00:39:31.909   const errorDetails = typeof registerData === 'object' && registerData !== null && 'details' in registerData ? registerData.details : '';
00:39:31.909   setEsp32MessageType('error');
00:39:31.909   setEsp32Message(`⚠ ${errorMsg}`);
00:39:31.909   addToast(`Error: ${errorMsg}`, 'error', 6000, errorDetails);
00:39:31.909   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 6000);
00:39:31.909   return;
00:39:31.909   }
00:39:31.909   // Procesar respuesta exitosa
00:39:31.909   if (typeof registerData === 'object' && registerData !== null && 'success' in registerData && registerData.success) {
00:39:31.909   const data = registerData;
00:39:31.909   // Manejo de respuesta ESP32
00:39:31.909   if (data.esp32?.ok) {
00:39:31.909   setEsp32MessageType('success');
00:39:31.909   setEsp32Message(type === 'entry' ? '✓ Entrada registrada - Puerta abierta' : '✓ Salida registrada - Puerta abierta');
00:39:31.909   addToast(data.message, 'success', 5000, 'ESP32: Activo • Acceso permitido');
00:39:31.909   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 5000);
00:39:31.909   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'timeout') {
00:39:31.909   setEsp32MessageType('error');
00:39:31.909   setEsp32Message('⚠ Timeout: ESP32 no responde');
00:39:31.909   addToast(data.message, type === 'exit' ? 'warning' : 'error', 6000, 'ESP32: Timeout (5000ms)');
00:39:31.909   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 6000);
00:39:31.909   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'error') {
00:39:31.909   setEsp32MessageType('error');
00:39:31.909   setEsp32Message('⚠ Error conectando a ESP32');
00:39:31.909   addToast(data.message, type === 'exit' ? 'warning' : 'error', 6000, 'ESP32: Error de conexión');
00:39:31.909   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 6000);
00:39:31.909   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'not_configured') {
00:39:31.909   setEsp32MessageType('warning');
00:39:31.909   setEsp32Message('ℹ ESP32 no configurado');
00:39:31.909   addToast(data.message, 'warning', 4000, 'ESP32: No configurado');
00:39:31.909   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 4000);
00:39:31.909   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'inactive') {
00:39:31.909   setEsp32MessageType('warning');
00:39:31.909   setEsp32Message(type === 'exit' ? '✓ Salida registrada (suscripción inactiva)' : '⚠ Suscripción inactiva');
00:39:31.909   addToast(data.message, type === 'exit' ? 'success' : 'warning', 5000, type === 'exit' ? 'Salida permitida sin ESP32' : 'Acceso denegado');
00:39:31.909   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 5000);
00:39:31.909   } else {
00:39:31.909   setEsp32MessageType('success');
00:39:31.909   setEsp32Message(`✓ ${type === 'entry' ? 'Entrada' : 'Salida'} registrada`);
00:39:31.909   addToast(data.message, 'success', 4000);
00:39:31.909   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 4000);
00:39:31.909   }
00:39:31.909   }
00:39:31.909   } catch (err) {
00:39:31.909   const errorMsg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Error al registrar acceso';
00:39:31.909   setError(errorMsg);
00:39:31.910   addToast('Error al registrar acceso', 'error', 5000, errorMsg);
00:39:31.910   } finally{
00:39:31.910   setLoading(false);
00:39:31.910   setActionType(null);
00:39:31.910   }
00:39:31.910   };
00:39:31.910   const renderResult = ()=>{
00:39:31.910   if (!result) return null;
00:39:31.910   if (!result.found) {
00:39:31.910   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("div", {
00:39:31.910   className: " xs:mt-5 xs:p-4 mt-4 rounded-lg border border-red-500/30 bg-red-950/20 p-3 sm:mt-6 sm:p-6 ",
00:39:31.910   children: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:31.910   className: " xs:gap-3 flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:gap-4 ",
00:39:31.910   children: [
00:39:31.910   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__["AlertCircle"], {
00:39:31.910   className: " xs:h-6 xs:w-6 size-5 flex-shrink-0 text-red-400 sm:size-6 "
00:39:31.910   }),
00:39:31.910   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:31.910   className: "flex-1",
00:39:31.910   children: [
00:39:31.911   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("h3", {
00:39:31.911   className: " xs:text-base text-sm font-semibold text-red-400 sm:text-lg ",
00:39:31.911   children: "Usuario no encontrado"
00:39:31.911   }),
00:39:31.911   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("p", {
00:39:31.911   className: " xs:text-xs mt-1 text-xs text-gray-400 sm:text-sm ",
00:39:31.911   children: result.message ?? 'No se encontró ningún usuario con los datos proporcionados'
00:39:31.911   })
00:39:31.911   ]
00:39:31.911   })
00:39:31.911   ]
00:39:31.911   })
00:39:31.911   });
00:39:31.911   }
00:39:31.911   const { user } = result;
00:39:31.911   const isActive = user?.subscriptionStatus === 'active';
00:39:31.911   const daysRemaining = user?.daysRemaining ?? 0;
00:39:31.911   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:31.911   className: " xs:mt-5 xs:space-y-3 mt-4 space-y-2 sm:mt-6 sm:space-y-4 md:space-y-5 ",
00:39:31.911   children: [
00:39:31.911   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {

00:39:31.911   children: [
00:39:31.911   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("h3", {
00:39:31.911   className: " xs:mb-3 xs:text-lg mb-2 text-base font-bold text-cyan-400 sm:mb-4 sm:text-xl ",
00:39:31.911   children: "Información del Usuario"
00:39:31.911   }),
00:39:31.911   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:31.911   className: " xs:space-y-2 xs:text-sm space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-300 sm:text-base ",
00:39:31.911   children: [
00:39:31.911   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("p", {
00:39:31.911   className: "break-words",
00:39:31.911   children: [
00:39:31.911   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("span", {

00:39:31.911   children: "Nombre:"

00:39:31.911   ' ',

00:39:31.913   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__["AlertCircle"], {

00:39:31.913   }),
00:39:31.913   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
00:39:31.913   className: "flex-1",
00:39:31.913   children: [
